zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Stirveling of Rathoran於1294年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親William de Striveling32歲，母親Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran6歲。他和Barbara Swinburne至少有4個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1339年7月7日在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When John de Stirveling of Rathoran was born in 1294, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, William de Striveling, was 32 and his mother, Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, was 6. He had at least 4 sons and 4 daughters with Barbara Swinburne. He died on 7 July 1339, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Stirveling of Rathoran est né en 1294, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, William de Striveling, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, avait 6 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles avec Barbara Swinburne. Il est décédé le 7 juillet 1339, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Stirveling of Rathoran 1294 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Striveling 32 und seine Mutter Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran 6. Er hatte mit Barbara Swinburne mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Juli 1339 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Stirveling of Rathoran è nato il nel 1294 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, William de Striveling, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran, aveva 6 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie con Barbara Swinburne. Morì il 7 luglio 1339, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Stirveling of Rathoranが1294年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父William de Strivelingは32歳，母Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoranは6歳であった。彼はBarbara Swinburneとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1339年7月7日にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Stirveling of Rathoran(이)가 1294년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Striveling(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie MacDúbhgaill - Heiress of Rathoran(은)는 6세였다. 그는 Barbara Swinburne(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 7월 7일 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.
